input.company_description: Enterprise AI platform enabling companies to build and deploy custom machine learning models without dedicated data science teams. 85 employees, Series B funded, based in San Francisco. Competes with DataRobot and H2O.ai. Sells to Fortune 500 engineering and analytics teams.

pain_points: competing with well-funded incumbents like DataRobot and H2O.ai
long enterprise sales cycles selling to Fortune 500 buyers
convincing teams they don't need dedicated data scientists with the platform
expected_output.reasoning: VC-backed SaaS selling to Fortune 500 is a completely different motion than the service-business outbound this ICP targets. Wrong industry, wrong buyer profile, wrong sales cycle.

review.notes: Auto-approved after self-review. Weak fit correct: VC-backed SaaS selling to Fortune 500 is wrong ICP.
